briefdescription.para: Mock catalogs kept alive during the test (for failure injection).
Commit file_a_ with FastAppend so the table has data to rewrite.
Read all manifest entries from a set of manifests.
Get data manifests from a snapshot.
Get delete manifests from a snapshot.
List Avro metadata files in the mock filesystem.
Set commit retry properties on the table.
Re-bind table_ to use a mock catalog that fails UpdateTable N times, then delegates to the real catalog. The call_count pointer is incremented on each UpdateTable call (successful or not).
